name: Fresh Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Two hours before serving, combine the Caesar salad dressing with the cottage cheese in a bowl.
2. Wash and prepare the fresh spinach by removing any large vein from the center of each leaf and tearing it into desired size pieces.
3. Drain the prepared spinach if necessary.
4. Pour the dressing over the spinach and toss gently to coat evenly.
5. Serve immediately.
